HOME.TAGLINE: I transform innovative ideas into robust and scalable web solutions, spanning from user interface design to server-side logic. My passion lies in building smooth and efficient digital experiences, always learning and adapting to the latest technologies.
HOME.EXP_CARD_DESC: Development and maintenance of user interfaces for scalable web applications using Angular and TypeScript. Collaboration in agile teams.
HOME.PROJECT_CARD_DESC: Design and development of a custom CMS system with React and Node.js, including user authentication and RESTful API.
HOME.CTA_DESC: Let's talk about how my skills can boost your next project.

ABOUT.SUBTITLE: Full-stack Developer
ABOUT.LEAD_TEXT: I transform legacy code into modern architectures. Specialized in the Angular + Spring Boot ecosystem with real experience migrating enterprise applications from JSF.
ABOUT.BODY_1: Since 2022 I have worked at companies like PENTEC, Minsait and VIEWNEXT, developing fullstack applications that connect dynamic frontends with robust APIs. I am passionate about clean development, teamwork and finding elegant solutions to complex problems.
ABOUT.BODY_2: Currently in Valencia, combining hybrid work with continuous learning. Always exploring new technologies that bring real value to projects.
ABOUT.EDU_1_DEGREE: Higher Degree in Cross-Platform Application Development
ABOUT.EDU_1_DESC: Training in cross-platform development with Java, Angular, TypeScript, SQL, HTML, CSS, Android Studio and Swift.
ABOUT.EDU_2_DESC: Advanced technical degree specialized in electronic systems maintenance.
ABOUT.EXP_1_DESC: Fullstack development with Angular and Spring Boot. Migration from JSF to modern architecture. REST API implementation and dynamic components. Technologies: Java, Spring, Angular, TypeScript, Maven, SVN.
ABOUT.EXP_2_DESC: Development of interactive forms in Adobe Experience Manager (AEM). UX optimization and workflow automation. Work in Agile environments. Technologies: AEM, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Git.
ABOUT.EXP_3_DESC: Web application development with Java, Spring Boot and JavaScript. Unit testing (JUnit), version control with Git. Training in microservices. Technologies: Java, Spring Boot, JUnit, Git, SQL, Maven.
ABOUT.EXP_4_DESC: Development of C# solutions integrated with PI System. Industrial data analysis and real-time visualization. Work in agile environment. Technologies: C#, PI System, SQL, Git.
